scripts.test: scripts/check-file-size.sh && pnpm intent && pnpm typecheck && node --test --test-reporter=dot 'packages/*/src/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.intent: for f in .hiker/tents/*/*.tent; do hiker check "$f" || exit 1; done && scripts/extract-intent-facts.sh && hiker verify .hiker/tents/domain-purity/domain-purity.tent --facts .hiker-cache/domain-purity.facts.json
